description: Mexican criminal organization and U.S.-designated Foreign Terrorist Organization specializing in drug trafficking, illegal mining, and extortion. Formed in 2011 as a splinter group after the original La Familia Michoacana lost power. Headed by Johnny Hurtado Olascoaga and his brother Jose Alfredo Hurtado Olascoaga. Operates primarily in Michoacán and Guerrero, with presence in at least 35 Mexican municipalities and several U.S. states.

country_links.evidence_quote: the organization is primarily involved in the distribution of cocaine , fentanyl , and methamphetamine to the United States
country_links.context: The organization distributes cocaine, fentanyl, and methamphetamine to the United States.
